calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Application To Terminate Probate On Waiver Of Accounting And Request For Statutory Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Jun-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Lee for Jasmine Dildy.

The Court asked Counsel to file a Petition to Terminate Administration of the Estate on Waiver of Account with notice to the Creditors and stated that Counsel can ask for fees. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel and the status hearing were continued to June 29, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Jun-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-02-2011 Continued To Apr-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Peiser and Carolyn Lee for Jasmine Didly (Administrator).

Ms. Peiser stated that she had no contact with the Client for years and that she had no ability to represent her. The matter was continued to April 13, 20111 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Peiser that notice was to be sent the Franchise Tax Board and that it would also request filing of a petition for termination and request for attorney's fees pursuant to Probate Code 10953(c) prior to withdrawal. The Court will also issue an Order to Appear to Jasmine Dildy (Administrator) to appear April 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
